mapper.insert: /* oms-po-olnCtItemIvBatch-sql-oraclee.xml - mergeOlnCtItemIv */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_REQORDERIV ( OWKEY , CTKEY , ICKEY , AVQTY , UNUSEQTY , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT DISTINCT OWKEY , CTKEY , ICKEY , AVQTY , UNUSEQTY , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_REQORDERIV WHERE IFID = #{interfaceId} ON CONFLICT (OWKEY, CTKEY, ICKEY) DO UPDATE SET AVQTY = EXCLUDED.AVQTY , UNUSEQTY = EXCLUDED.UNUSEQTY , UPDATEURKEY = EXCLUDED.UPDATEURKEY , UPDATEDATE = EXCLUDED.UPDATEDATE
